message: This is where she told me to meet her... This is the right place, right?

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't see anyone that could be her..."
Maybe I just got here early...
There's so much grace and elegance in these sentences...
Her writing is different from that of the cockroaches.
I have to see through the deception.
If I don't... I'll just suffer...
Those messages were just a prank.
I wanted to believe that it was just a coincidence.
Why does she always show up in places like this?
She always shows up at weird times.
Now that I think of it...
And... that time I witnessed Shiroyama's death...

name: Zakuro
message: "A demon will whisper in your ear."

name: Zakuro
message: "The demon will attempt to block your path."

name: Zakuro
message: "You must not listen to the demon's words."
Just like the letter said... My memories from the previous world?
If it wasn't my memories from the previous world...
Then this person that's always following me...
Why is she always following me?
Then... the others must really be out there, too.
The demon trying to block my path is proof that my allies really do exist.
My allies, the ones who saved the world in their past incarnations, really do exist.

name: Zakuro
message: "I... I'm the one asking the question! Answer me!"

name: Ayana
message: "I'm looking at you... I'm looking at your form."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? What's that? Is that fun to you? Do you like looking at people? Or do you just like watching me suffer?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Then I'm sorry, but my suffering is over."

name: Ayana
message: "So then... what are you doing here?"

name: Zakuro
message: "What's it matter to you?! It has nothing to do with you!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehe... Then maybe it has nothing to do with you whether I'm here or not..."
She really is the demon... That's why she's challenging me.
Then the answer... The answer is obvious.
I can't rise to her challenge.
I have to ignore the demon.

name: Ayana
message: "The way in which you relate to the world."
When I opened my eyes, Otonashi Ayana was gone.

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-Yes... I am, but... who are you?"

name: Usami
message: "Nice to meet you. My name is Sukikawa Usami."

name: Zakuro
message: "You're the person who sent me all those messages?"
She's the person who sent those texts.
She's my ally from the previous world, but she just looks like a normal person.

name: Usami
message: "Ehehe, were you disappointed because I look like a normal person?"

name: Usami
message: "Did you think I read your mind?"

name: Usami
message: "No. My memory from the previous world has returned, but my power has not. That's why..."

name: Usami
message: "Ehehe, and it was written all over your face."
Is it that easy to read my expressions?
But she was honest when she told me that she just read my expression, not my mind.
If she was trying to deceive me, she would've claimed to have supernatural powers like mind reading... She didn't lie, though...

name: Usami
message: "If you've come here, does that mean you've recovered your memory as well?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No... I haven't, I just read your message, and I was curious..."

name: Usami
message: "No, it's a bit unbelievable, isn't it?"

name: Usami
message: "But you were curious, so you came."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, a lot has happened since I got your first message."

name: Usami
message: "It looks like one of your problems disappeared, right?"

name: Usami
message: "You saw something, and that's why you came... Am I wrong?"

name: Usami
message: "I infused that message with my power."

name: Usami
message: "Yes. So if you're our ally, you should have experienced a change."
I don't know if you could call it a change, but a lot of weird stuff had happened.
That man died, and I saw those images... and... Otonashi Ayana...

name: Usami
message: "What did you see? Was it a dream?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes... I saw it in my dreams several times, but I don't really remember it all that well."

name: Usami
message: "Then how do you know you saw it in your dreams?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... There was an accident at school, and someone fell from the roof... The second I witnessed that, suddenly the image from my dream..."

name: Zakuro
message: "When I saw that image, I knew I had seen it in a dream... No, maybe it wasn't a dream. Maybe I saw it a long time ago, in a place very far from here..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um... There was something really big falling from the sky, and it seemed..."

name: Usami
message: "Excuse me... I'll introduce her. This is Mizuo Ayumi-chan."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um... Nice to meet you, my name is Takashima Zakuro."
Her cheeks flushed... She looked nervous.

name: Usami
message: "Sorry about that. Ayumi-chan isn't very good at talking."

name: Zakuro
message: "By the way, what was that Har Megiddo you mentioned?"

name: Usami
message: "Ayumi-chan, it seems Zakuro-san's Brain Reverse still isn't complete."
Ayumi-chan, what do you think we should do?"

name: Usami
message: "Oh... That would be a good spot."

name: Usami
message: "Zakuro-san, do you want to go somewhere else?"

name: Usami
message: "I don't want to stand around talking here... We never know who's listening."

name: Usami
message: "Yeah... For now, we can only talk in private places like this..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Th-This is where people come to drink alcohol, isn't it?"

name: Usami
message: "Yeah, I guess so, but they call themselves a cafe, so they have coffee and tea too."
Being at a place like this so late at night...
If my parents or the school found out, I would be in big trouble.
Why do I care about that?
Why should I care? They don't do anything for me... None of them ever came to save me...
If I think about it, it's really ridiculous.
I took out my cell phone.

name: Zakuro
message: "To be honest, I don't understand what all of this means."

name: Usami
message: "You don't understand, but you still came."

name: Usami
message: "Rather than a prediction... I would call it a certainty."

name: Usami
message: "Yes... You were tormented by the demon... and by the people who were manipulated by the sealed nevus' Specialized Physics Bug."

name: Zakuro
message: "That nevus... and the Specialized Physics Bug..."
Usami-san took out her own cell phone and showed me a picture.

name: Usami
message: "What do you think... about this place?"

name: Usami
message: "Yeah, it must be a really awful place for you."

name: Usami
message: "I... We know almost everything about you.
They know what happened to me...
That I was defiled in this place...
That's why she showed me this picture...

name: Usami
message: "And we want you to help us."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Help you? What do I need to do?"

name: Usami
message: "Just like I told you before, we were allies in our previous lives, fighting to save the world."

name: Zakuro
message: "A lot has happened since then. That man died... and God appeared before me, and the demon..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes... God was a half naked, middle-aged man... He was several hundred times as tall as a normal person."

name: Zakuro
message: "The demon... has possessed one of the girls at my school, and now she's tormenting me..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's what you said would happen. The demon has appeared, and she's trying to lure me astray. It actually happened..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That man's death... and I saw the image of a sky shrouded in gloom, like a terrible flashback..."

name: Zakuro
message: "If I hadn't gotten your message before all that happened..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I would've completely broken. I wouldn't have understood anything... No one else could explain all this to me... I, I..."

name: Usami
message: "So in the end, the Specialized Physics Bug in Tokyo's 23rd district attempted to eliminate the weakest of us, Zakuro-san..."

name: Usami
message: "Before that... I should explain everything from the beginning."

name: Usami
message: "In the distant past, deep in outer space, there was a nebula cloud... and within that nebula, a planet called Elhimuro."

name: Usami
message: "Yeah, it was an external universe... Unlike this universe, it was very peaceful."

name: Usami
message: "The inhabitants of Elhimuro were especially peaceful people..."

name: Usami
message: "But regardless of that peace, the people fell to corruption, and evil lived within their hearts, ultimately calling forth a great disaster."

name: Usami
message: "The lord of all things... The primeval chaos living within the core of infinity... The unknowable, the shapeless, the heart of darkness... The chaos that wells up from within. There are countless ways to name him."

name: Usami
message: "The corruption within the people's hearts woke that which was confined to the depths of chaos."

name: Usami
message: "When he awakes, the world will end. The world is only permitted to exist while he dreams."

name: Zakuro
message: "The world only exists... while he dreams..."

name: Usami
message: "Yes, and the end of that dream is synonymous with the end of the world."

name: Usami
message: "But the denizens of Elhimuro, overly accustomed to the long peace, did nothing to stop it."

name: Usami
message: "Even with the end of the world before their very eyes."

name: Usami
message: "The three of us were the only ones to stand and fight before."

name: Usami
message: "We were each given our own powers and titles as warriors..."

name: Usami
message: "The Crimson Hyperspace... You are... Angel Advise!"

name: Usami
message: "Yes... I was saved by your prodigious powers more than once."

name: Usami
message: "I'm the Golden Light, Angel Remover, and Ayumi-chan is the Azure Twinkling, Angel Night."
I was injured when I moved to cover Angel Night with my own body.

name: Ayumi
message: "You fool! Why would you do that just to protect me?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "It's all right. I'm fine... We have to hurry and dispense with them..."

name: Ayumi
message: "I'll never... I'll never forgive you for hurting my friend!"

name: Usami
message: "I will defeat you... so that the denizens of this world may live in peace!"
This happened long in the past...
I was sure I had completely forgotten the events of that day...
But now I remember it like it was yesterday.
For some reason... I had tears streaming down my cheeks.
For some reason... the tears wouldn't stop.

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right... Back then, you two were really worried about me."

name: Zakuro
message: "You were both so worried about me when I was injured."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right. That was the battle at the stone tower. I definitely saw that tower behind us."

name: Usami
message: "Yes. The great disaster feared our power after having failed in its attempt to destroy the world, so it put a seal on our souls when we were reincarnated in this world."

name: Usami
message: "Yes, the final confrontation... The battle at the hill of Megiddo."

name: Usami
message: "We fought to prevent the world's destruction... That was a long battle, a series of tribulations..."

name: Usami
message: "And then, in the last days... we faced Har Megiddo..."

name: Usami
message: "We fought and fought, no matter how many times we were injured, no matter how many times we fell."

name: Usami
message: "And we saved the world from Har Megiddo."

name: Usami
message: "But... its power was too strong. We failed to destroy it."

name: Usami
message: "The great disaster was confined in the hyperspace at the core of chaos, but..."

name: Usami
message: "In preparation for its revival, we chose the path of reincarnation to increase our powers, but..."

name: Usami
message: "In the moment of our reincarnation, the great disaster cast this cursed seal upon us to frustrate our efforts."

name: Usami
message: "Yes... So that we would be reborn as powerless human girls."
That's right... That powerful seal is the reason why I never remembered it before...

name: Zakuro
message: "But... then how can we recover our memories?"

name: Usami
message: "Oh, sorry. That's how we refer to the recovery of our past memories, but... there's a reason why the Brain Reverse isn't complete."

name: Zakuro
message: "But we have to recover our memories... If Har Megiddo is going to happen again... Doesn't that mean the great disaster is coming back?!"
In response, Usami-san and Ayumi-san both silently nodded.
But what can I hope to do?
I still haven't recovered all my memories, and I don't have any superpowers like before.

name: Usami
message: "We've thought the same thing for a long time, but the reality is that our power hasn't returned either."

name: Usami
message: "Ayumi-chan and I have only recovered a small portion of our power. That's how we were able to find you, but we don't have enough power to save the world."

name: Zakuro
message: "But didn't we reincarnate in this world to attain even more power?"

name: Usami
message: "But Har Megiddo has attacked us in more ways than just the seal."

name: Usami
message: "The great disaster has sent its vanguard to ensure that we never recover enough power to save the world."

name: Usami
message: "The vanguard possesses humans in order to get close to us and plant evil thoughts within us."

name: Usami
message: "Haven't you experienced them too? Haven't you wished the world would just end, or that you could just disappear?"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right... I've thought things like that many times..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I thought all of those things until just yesterday. I even wanted to kill myself..."

name: Usami
message: "You weren't the only one. Ayumi-chan and I both thought much the same until our powers returned..."
The great disaster is the reason why I had to suffer!

name: Usami
message: "Athers, the great disaster, was concerned that the seal wouldn't suffice."

name: Usami
message: "It prevented the Brain Reverse from occurring, but there's always the possibility of it happening so long as we're alive."

name: Usami
message: "That was the thought process behind its next move."

name: Usami
message: "Zakuro-san... Does some particular event come to mind?"

name: Usami
message: "Yes, the tragedy that you would rather forget for all time... That's it."
They were the great disaster's vanguard...
I was defiled by those bastards...
It happened to both of them too.
Just like me... they were defiled.

name: Female Student
message: "You don't want to make us angry."

name: Female Student
message: "We'll burn all your fucking hair down there, then make you walk home naked."

name: Female Student
message: "No one's gonna want to watch this shit."

name: Female Student
message: "Don't worry about it. Just do it."

name: Female Student
message: "Yeah, then we can sell them on the Internet. People pay tons for this stuff."

name: Female Student
message: "We'll make sure to erase our phone numbers."

name: Female Student
message: "Why don't we just force her to do it?"

name: Female Student
message: "Yeah, it kinda is. How about this..."

name: Female Student
message: "She pissed herself when I stepped on her."

name: Female Student
message: "Yeah, there are people into that shit."

name: Female Student
message: "Wow, Ayumi, you're going to be so popular with the perverts. You'll be their idol!"

name: Female Student
message: "We'll take her virginity! How about that?"

name: Female Student
message: "I wish you would just shut up and take it instead of bitching every three seconds."

name: Ayumi
message: "Please... Let me go... Please let me go..."

name: Female Student
message: "Wh-Why did you bring this thing along?"
I wasn't the only one suffering...
We've all suffered the same fate...
I thought I was the only one who had to bear this burden...

name: Zakuro
message: "Until today, I thought I was all alone... I thought I was the only one suffering."

name: Usami
message: "No... It's not your fault. It's the great disaster's fault."
It was all the great disaster trying to destroy the world.
That's the source of all my problems.

name: Usami
message: "...The great disaster wanted to seal our power away by planting its evil directly within our bodies."

name: Usami
message: "It succeeded in sealing our powers, but it was only through this experience that we recovered our memories... You haven't completely recovered your memories, but that's just a matter of time. It's rather ironic that the great disaster worked against itself in this case."

name: Ayumi
message: "Thanks to that... we finally found you."
To think that my true friends were waiting for me...
I've never been this happy before in my life!
I was born to save this world!
The tears of joy wouldn't stop.

name: Zakuro
message: "By the way, you said there was something else you needed me to help with."
Usami-chan wiped away the tears and began to talk.

name: Usami
message: "You remember when I said the revival of the great disaster and Har Megiddo was approaching?"

name: Usami
message: "We want to stop it... We want to save the world!"

name: Usami
message: "That's right... It's true that our hearts were clouded with evil, that before we wished for this world to be destroyed, but there are many innocent people in this world. Many in this world are kind―even compassionate!"

name: Usami
message: "I... I want to save those people!"

name: Usami
message: "That's right! Our mission is to save all those people!"
I'm the warrior, fighting to save the world!
If I don't do it, then who will?

name: Usami
message: "And the evil people who attacked us were originally human before they were possessed... If we vanquish the great disaster, they'll return to normal!"
If we save the world, all those people will return to normal...
Then why did he have to die?
Wasn't he another person possessed by the evil?
Then he should have gone back to normal once the world was saved...

name: Usami
message: "The being posessing these humans is... the Specialized Physics Bug..."

name: Usami
message: "A bug created from a material exempt from the laws of conventional physics."

name: Usami
message: "It's an insect that infests a person's mind and eats their thoughts, memories, and emotions."

name: Usami
message: "Yes, the people who have been possessed by this insect are no different from insects themselves."

name: Zakuro
message: "Insects... So that's all they are... Just bugs..."

name: Usami
message: "Yes, it planted Specialized Physics Bugs in the people around all three of us in order to induce a low energy state in us, the three angel warriors."

name: Usami
message: "If a person is infested by a Specialized Physics Bug for a long period of time, their brain almost completely disappears."

name: Usami
message: "Yesterday, Angel Night and I used our powers to create a barrier field in Tokyo's 23rd district, thereby exterminating the Specialized Physics Bug."

name: Usami
message: "So the person whose brain had been eaten by the Specialized Physics Bug went mad once the bug disappeared."

name: Usami
message: "The person who tortured you destroyed himself."

name: Usami
message: "Yes, so you don't need to worry about that."

name: Zakuro
message: "But, he... He was just possessed by the evil. He wasn't originally..."

name: Usami
message: "But... the bug is especially compatible with people whose hearts are already evil. The person who was infested had an evil heart to begin with, and gradually that person fused with the bug."

name: Usami
message: "He was compatible with the Specialized Physics Bug because he was evil at heart."

name: Usami
message: "He fused with the bug to the point where almost all of his brain was eaten. That's proof that he was evil at heart."

name: Usami
message: "In a way, his death was just retribution for his sins."

name: Usami
message: "Even if they hadn't been infested, they would have committed some other crime eventually."

name: Usami
message: "And... why should they get off scot-free after defiling us? They should accept their retribution."
That's right... That has to be it... It was their just recompense...

name: Zakuro
message: "They were evil at heart; they were beyond salvation..."

name: Usami
message: "Yes, this is divine retribution... We couldn't have hoped to save them."
It's our mission to save the world, but we can't do anything without our powers.

name: Ayumi
message: "...There's one way to recover our powers."

name: Usami
message: It's just as Ayumi said... There's a way to recover our Extradimensional Powers."

name: Usami
message: "To do it, we have to complete the ritual known as Spiral Matai."

name: Usami
message: "If we complete this ritual, we can recover our powers."

name: Usami
message: "But bravery is required for this ritual..."

name: Usami
message: "We reincarnated ourselves in this world in order to gain greater powers... In order to recover our powers, we have to go through an experience similar to reincarnation once again."

name: Usami
message: "We have to have a near-death experience. If we survive, we'll be able to recover our Extradimensional Powers."

name: Usami
message: "Yes... That's what the Spiral Matai is."

name: Usami
message: "In truth, we wanted to wait until you fully recovered your memories before doing it, but..."

name: Usami
message: "But the world's destruction, Bick Hazard, is approaching."
That's just nine days from now!

name: Usami
message: "It's true... July 20th is the day of Har Megiddo..."

name: Usami
message: "The Bible tells of Armageddon, and Nostrodamus predicted that it would come in the seventh month of the year..."
Armageddon is coming in just nine days...
I finally met my friends and now...

name: Zakuro
message: "...When are we going to do it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Let's do it... Let's complete the Spiral Matai."

name: Zakuro
message: "If we don't do it soon, we can't recover our powers!"

name: Zakuro
message: "And... if we don't recover our powers, the world will be destroyed."

name: Zakuro
message: "I would... I would never see any of you again!"

name: Zakuro
message: "If we're all together, we can do anything!"

name: Zakuro
message: "We're... We're allies. We'll always be there to help each other!"

name: Zakuro
message: "When do you want to carry out the ritual?"

name: Usami
message: "Ayumi-chan, when do you think we should do it?"
Ayumi-chan closed her eyes and thought for a moment.

name: Usami
message: "Ayumi-chan has the power to read the stars. It was through her powers that we finally found you."

name: Usami
message: "Actually, Ayumi-chan got hit by a car a few months ago."

name: Usami
message: "Yeah... Right now it's hidden by her hair, but she has a really bad scar on her head."

name: Usami
message: "She recovered a small part of her power after that."

name: Usami
message: "So she's the only one who has any power right now, and even that is just a fraction of her full power."

name: Zakuro
message: "But... it was that power that put up the barrier field and found me..."
Wow... If our full power comes back, then we could...

name: Ayumi
message: "The star of Ganjima... That building... The star of Mande... is appr...oaching... Zaroboi... Hiding in the shadow of... Elhimuro's... power..."

name: Usami
message: "Tomorrow evening... We'll be most closely attuned to Elhimuro's energy at 6:42..."

name: Ayumi
message: "A little to the right... The apartment complex next door would be... ideal."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's where we'll carry out the Spiral Matai?"
My power will return, and I'll be able to save the world!

name: Usami
message: "We're going to have a near-death experience..."

name: Zakuro
message: "That is scary... but if we don't do it, we can't save the world."

name: Zakuro
message: "If we're all together, we'll be fine, no matter what!"
Usami and Ayumi didn't say anything. They simply nodded their approval.

name: Zakuro
message: "We're true friends... No matter what happens, we'll stick together..."
Today, I found my raison d'etre.
I'm the warrior, sent here to save the world!
I've finally found my true friends.
I've never been so happy before in my life.
I'm as happy as any human could ever be.
I wonder if anyone else has ever been this happy?
I want to share this happiness with everyone...
The time of the world's destruction...
The world will end in nine days.
I can't let my happiness end so soon...
A great, black shadow... covering the sky...
If we just finish the Spiral Matai, I'll be able to recover my Extradimensional Powers!
Then I'll be able to save the world, and I'll be happy like this forever!
But I wonder what my Extradimensional Powers were like?

name: Zakuro
message: "Will I be able to shoot pink energy blasts from my hands?"
Could I really save the world with something like that?
It's gotta be something really amazing...
There's no way it's something boring like shooting energy blasts.
Once I recover my power, I can save everyone.
Then they'll all be kind to me.
My mother, and my classmates, and... Mamiya-kun, too.
It must have been the Specialized Physics Bug making him act like that when he was in the underground room.
Once we save the world, Mamiya-kun will go back to his smart, caring self.
Now that I think back on it... I'm pretty sure Usami-chan said something like this.

name: Usami
message: "The memories of that experience will never go away..."

name: Usami
message: "Spiral Matai allows you to transcend your physical form... You'll be able to leave your incomplete human body behind and be reborn as a full-fledged angel warrior."

name: Usami
message: "That's right. The body that they defiled will go back to normal. The only thing that will remain will be the memories."

name: Usami
message: "We'll know no more pain after that moment... when we're reborn..."

name: Usami
message: "You have someone you love, don't you, Zakuro-chan?"

name: Usami
message: "Before, when you said everyone would go back to their kind selves... you hesitated for just a moment."

name: Usami
message: "I thought you were probably remembering someone you loved."

name: Usami
message: "There's someone I love too... It was our fate to be united, but..."

name: Usami
message: "Ahahaha, in the past world, that is. We were engaged."

name: Usami
message: "Yeah, we were going to be married in Elhimuro..."

name: Usami
message: "I had to fight the great disaster before we could be wed... and in the final battle, I gave my life to save the world."

name: Usami
message: "After that, he... he chased after my spirit for millions of years... Billions of years... Trillions of years he reincarnated, time and time again, searching for me..."
That's longer than the universe has existed...

name: Usami
message: "Yeah... and we finally met again in this world, but the evil people tore us apart once again."

name: Usami
message: "Yeah... Takanobu-kun is being tricked! It's that evil woman's fault! She's pure evil, and she seduced him!"

name: Usami
message: "So... once this battle is over... he'll remember everything..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah. Make sure you invite me to your wedding."

name: Zakuro
message: "You've been waiting to get married for trillions of years... We have to win this time!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah, once this battle is over... Once everything is peaceful, then we'll get married too..."

name: Usami
message: "We'll return to our true bodies... and be able to face our loved ones again..."

name: Zakuro
message: "My dirty body will be clean again..."
After this all ends, I'll be able to...
I'll be able to face Mamiya-kun again.
